title: Exterior Door Handle Front Left Black Textured For 04-12 Colorado Canyon

Direct replacement for factory door handle with clip-on attachment and no modification required for installation

Precision-engineered to match factory dimensions and mounting points for 2004-2012 Chevy Colorado and GMC Canyon
Replace worn, broken, or faded handles in minutes with basic hand tools for an instant exterior upgrade
